visual: Feet parallel shoulder-width apart, arms hanging softly at the sides, body relaxed and upright — the neutral pre-form standing posture.
motion_description: The body remains entirely motionless in a steady, continuous hold, with feet positioned parallel and shoulder-width apart. Weight is distributed evenly across both legs. The arms hang down at the sides, elbows slightly bent and hands separated from the thighs, while the torso is maintained in a straight, forward-facing orientation with no rotation.
